nodes.name: Schedule 18h BRT
nodes.notes: Zazu: dispara diariamente às 18:00 BRT (21:00 UTC). Resumo dos grupos WhatsApp para o CPO.

nodes.name: Set Date + Worker URL
nodes.notes: Data (ontem) + workerBaseUrl. Edite WORKER_BASE_URL se o deploy mudar. Alternativa admin: N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false e $env no GET.

nodes.name: GET Daily Messages
nodes.notes: Timeout 300s: worker WA pode levar minutos (getChats + fetchMessages). URL = workerBaseUrl do nó anterior.

nodes.name: Format Founder Report
nodes.notes: Zazu: monta título e conteúdo para adv_founder_reports. C-Suite e Cagan leem nos últimos 7 dias.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title, content: $json.content, csuite_memory: { type: 'founder_csuite_daily', date: $json.reportDate, source: ['zazu_whatsapp'] } }) }}

nodes.name: POST Founder Report
nodes.notes: Grava em adv_founder_reports + espelho adv_csuite_memory (founder_csuite_daily). x-admin-key = CRON_SECRET.
